title.en: SOL Lab, LIG Defense & Aerospace Collaborative Project Started
title.ko: SOL Lab, LIG 디펜스&에어로스페이스 산합 과제 협력

description.en: SOL Lab launched the project 'Mission Planning Algorithm Development Considering Sensor Uncertainty under Underwater Environment' with LIG Defense & Aerospace as Principal Investigator.
description.ko: SOL Lab은 LIG 디펜스&에어로스페이스와 함께 '수중 환경에서 센서 불확실성을 고려한 임무 계획 알고리즘 개발' 과제를 연구책임자로 수행합니다.

title.en: Changbae Seo and Haechan Seo have joined the master’s program.
Congratulations to Changbae Seo and Seobeom Jeong on earning their B.S. degrees.
title.ko: 서창배, 정서범 학생의 학사 졸업을 축하합니다.

title.en: the NeurIPS Workshop on Optimization for Machine Learning Presentation by Prof. Jangho Park
title.ko: NeurIPS Optimization for Machine Learning 워크숍 발표 – 박장호 교수

description.en: Prof. Jangho Park presented "Per-Group Distributionally Robust Optimization (Per-Gdro) with Learnable Ambiguity Set Sizes via Bilevel Optimization" in the the NeurIPS Workshop on Optimization for Machine Learning, San Dieago CA USA.
description.ko: 박장호 교수님이 미국 샌디에이고에서 개최된 2025 NeurIPS Workshop on Optimization for Machine Learning에서 "Per-Group Distributionally Robust Optimization (Per-Gdro) with Learnable Ambiguity Set Sizes via Bilevel Optimization" 주제로 발표를 하였습니다.

title.en: INFORMS Presentation by Prof. Jangho Park

description.en: Prof. Jangho Park presented "Per-Group Distributionally Robust Optimization (Per-Gdro) with Learnable Ambiguity Set Sizes via Bilevel Optimization" in the Machine Learning and Optimization Session at the 2025 INFORMS Annual Meeting, Atlanta GA USA.
description.ko: 박장호 교수님이 미국 애틀랜타에서 개최된 2025 INFORMS Annual Meeting의 Machine Learning and Optimization Session에서 "Per-Group Distributionally Robust Optimization (Per-Gdro) with Learnable Ambiguity Set Sizes via Bilevel Optimization" 주제로 발표를 하였습니다.

title.en: SOL Lab received the Outstanding Young Scientist Grant (Seed Research)

description.en: SOL Lab received the Outstanding Young Scientist Grant (Seed Research) for 'Contextual Bilevel Distributionally Robust Optimization for Robust Decision-Making under Uncertainty' (National Research Foundation of Korea, PI, 2025.09 ~ 2026.08).
description.ko: SOL Lab은 '불확실성 하에서의 강건한 의사결정을 위한 맥락 기반 이중 수준 분포 강건 최적화' 연구 과제로 2025년 9월부터 2026년 8월까지 한국연구재단의 우수 신진연구자 기초연구사업(씨앗연구)에 선정되었습니다.

title.en: Technical Advisory Project on Lithium Production Optimization
title.ko: 리튬 생산량 최대화를 위한 조업조건 최적화 기술자문

description.en: SOL Lab is participating as Technical Advisor in the project 'Optimizing Operation Conditions to Maximize Lithium Production' (Confidential, 2025.09 ~ 2025.12).
description.ko: SOL Lab은 '리튬 생산량 최대화를 위한 조업조건 최적화 연구' 과제에 기술자문으로 참여하고 있습니다 (비공개, 2025.09 ~ 2025.12).

title.en: Subin Kim and Seongyoon Jeon Joined as Undergraduate Researchers

description.en: Subin Kim and Seongyoon Jeo, undergraduate students in the Department of Systems Management Engineering at Sungkyunkwan University, joined SOL Lab as undergraduate researchers in June 2025.
description.ko: 성균관대학교 시스템경영공학과 김수빈, 전성윤 학생이 2025년 8월부터 SOL Lab에 학부연구생으로 합류했습니다.

title.en: Invited Talk at Global Basic Research Lab for Neural Stochastic Optimization, KAIST
title.ko: 인공지능 기반 추계 최적화 알고리즘 개발 기초연구실 (카이스트) 초청 세미나 발표

description.en: Invited Speaker – Prof. Jangho Park presented "Distributionally Robust Optimization with Phi-Divergences" at the Global Basic Research Lab for Neural Stochastic Optimization at KAIST.
description.ko: 초청 세미나 강연 – 박장호 교수님이 카이스트 인공지능 기반 추계 최적화 알고리즘 개발 기초연구실에서 "Distributionally Robust Optimization with Phi-Divergences" 주제로 발표하였습니다.

title.en: Changbae Seo Joined the BS/MS Integrated Program

description.en: Changbae Seo, an undergraduate student majoring in Biological Sciences with a double major in Systems Management Engineering at Sungkyunkwan University, joined BS/MS Integrated Program as of June 2025.
description.ko: 성균관대학교 생명공학과(복수전공: 시스템경영공학) 서창배 학생이 2025년 6월부터 SOL Lab 학석사 연계과정에 합류했습니다.

title.en: Selected for 2025 Technology Research Council Project (KETEP)

description.en: SOL Lab is participating as Research Planning Committee Member in the 2025 Technology Research Council project on AI-based hydrogen and natural gas smart supply station development (KETEP, 2025.06 ~ 2025.11).
description.ko: SOL Lab은 'AI 융합 수소·천연가스 스마트 공급 스테이션 개발' 2025년도 기술연구회 과제에 연구기획위원으로 참여하고 있습니다 (한국에너지기술평가원, 2025.06 ~ 2025.11).

title.en: Donghyun Im and Jinseok Chun Joined as Undergraduate Researchers

description.en: Donghyun Im and Jinseok Chun, undergraduate students in the Department of Systems Management Engineering at Sungkyunkwan University, joined SOL Lab as undergraduate researchers in June 2025.
description.ko: 성균관대학교 시스템경영공학과 임동현, 전진석 학생이 2025년 6월부터 SOL Lab에 학부연구생으로 합류했습니다.

title.en: Minsoo Park joined as an undergraduate researcher

description.en: Minsoo Park, an undergraduate student at the University of Toronto, joined SOL Lab as a research intern from May to August 2025.
description.ko: 토론토대학교 박민수 학생이 2025년 5월부터 8월까지 SOL Lab에 학부연구생으로 합류했습니다.

title.en: Alina Ugay named 2025 POSCO Asia Fellow
title.ko: 우가이 알리나 학생, 2025 POSCO Asia Fellow 선정

description.en: Alina Ugay has been named a 2025 POSCO Asia Fellow. Congratulations! 🎉
description.ko: 우가이 알리나 학생이 2025 POSCO Asia Fellow로 선정되었습니다. 축하드립니다! 🎉

title.en: Future Mobility Bootcamp Project Started

description.en: SOL Lab is participating as faculty member in the Advanced Industry Talent Development Bootcamp (Future Mobility) project (Ministry of Education, 2025.03 ~ 2030.02).
description.ko: SOL Lab은 첨단산업 인재양성 부트캠프사업(미래차)에 참여교수로 참여하고 있습니다 (교육부, 2025.03 ~ 2030.02).

title.en: Alina Ugai joined as a master’s student
Woojae Lee joined as an undergraduate researcher

description.en: Woojae Lee, an undergraduate student at the Sungkyunkwan University, joined SOL Lab as a research intern from January 2025.
description.ko: 성균관대학교 시스템경영공학과 이우재 학생이 2025년 1월부터 SOL Lab에 학부연구생으로 합류했습니다.

title.en: INFORMS Presentation by Prof. Jangho Park

description.en: Prof. Jangho Park presented "Value of Data for Distributionally Robust Optimization with Phi-Divergences" in the Invited Session (OPT: Optimization Under Uncertainty) at the 2024 INFORMS Annual Meeting, Seattle WA USA.
description.ko: 박장호 교수님이 미국 시애틀에서 개최된 2024 INFORMS Annual Meeting의 초청 세션에서 (Invited Session - OPT: Optimization Under Uncertainty) "Value of Data for Distributionally Robust Optimization with Phi-Divergences" 주제로 발표를 하였습니다.

title.en: Participation in BK21 FOUR Smart Factory Program
title.ko: BK21 FOUR 자율형 스마트공장 교육연구단 참여

description.en: SOL Lab is participating in the Autonomous Smart Factory Education/Research Group, BK21 FOUR program (Ministry of Education, 2024.09 ~ 2027.08).
description.ko: SOL Lab은 자율형 스마트공장 교육연구단 BK21 FOUR 사업에 참여하고 있습니다 (교육부, 2024.09 ~ 2027.08).

title.en: Invited Talk at The Ohio State University

description.en: Invited Speaker - Prof. Jangho Park presented "Distributionally Robust Optimization with Phi-Divergences" at the Seminar Series in the Department of Integrated Systems Engineering at The Ohio State University.
description.ko: 초청 세미나 강연 - 박장호 교수님이 오하이오 주립대학교 산업시스템공학과 세미나 시리즈에서 "Distributionally Robust Optimization with Phi-Divergences" 주제로 발표를 하였습니다.

title.en: CJ Logistics Collaborative Project Started

description.en: SOL Lab launched the project 'AI-based Automated Invoice Trace Maintenance' with CJ Logistics as Principal Investigator (2024.08 ~ 2025.04).
description.ko: SOL Lab은 CJ대한통운과 함께 'AI 기반 택배 송장 Trace 정비 자동화' 과제를 연구책임자로 수행했습니다 (2024.08 ~ 2025.04).

title.en: Seobeom Jeong joined as an undergraduate researcher

description.en: Seobeom Jeong, an undergraduate student at the Sungkyunkwan University, joined SOL Lab as a research intern from August 2024.
description.ko: 성균관대학교 시스템경영공학과 정서범 학생이 2024년 8월부터 SOL Lab에 학부연구생으로 합류했습니다.

title.en: SOL Lab officially opened!

description.en: The Stochastic Optimization and Learning Laboratory (SOL Lab) is now open!
description.ko: 확률기반최적화 연구실 (The Stochastic Optimization and Learning Laboratory, SOL Lab)이 개소하였습니다!
